articles.title: 'Glint in their eyes': How Aussies watched the Socceroos match against Paraguay

articles.title: Quick hits: Selection shocks shine as kids skip school to watch Socceroos progress

children.content: Tony Popovic gives Socceroos fans what they wanted, fan sites overflow as a "headache" epidemic sweeps schools, and Australia avoids the most nervous of waits. Here are the quick hits from the Socceroos' final group game against Paraguay.

articles.title: Live table: Which third-placed teams will make it to the knockouts?

children.content: The Socceroos are through to the World Cup round of 32 thanks to a tense and physical 0-0 draw with Paraguay in San Francisco. Follow live.

items.title: Terminally ill 72-year-old still chasing solo sailing dreams
